languages.original_text: "After more than one decade of searching, I have amassed a modest collection of objects that belonged to these Necrons, but I have never succeeded in understanding the purpose of most of them. Many believe that Necrons died out long ago, leaving behind only ruins of black rock, but I do not believe so. They exist still, and they are closer than they seem."

languages.text: "Я веду свои поиски не один десяток лет, и у меня скопилась скромная коллекция объектов, принадлежавших им, но назначение большинства из них мне так и не удалось постичь. Многие считают, что некроны давно сгинули, оставив после себя лишь руины из черного камня, но я так не думаю. Они все еще существуют, и они ближе, чем кажется".

"After more than one decade of searching, I have amassed a modest collection of objects that belonged to these Necrons, but I have never succeeded in understanding the purpose of most of them. Many believe that Necrons died out long ago, leaving behind only ruins of black rock, but I do not believe so. They exist still, and they are closer than they seem."

Many believe that Necrons died out long ago, leaving behind only ruins of black rock, but I do not believe so. They exist still, and they are closer than they seem."

Many believe that Necrons died out long ago, leaving behind only ruins of black rock, but I do not believe so. They exist still, and they are closer than they seem."

languages.text: «Tras más de una década de búsqueda, he amasado una modesta colección de objetos que pertenecían a los Necrones, pero nunca he conseguido comprender el propósito de la mayoría de ellos. Muchos creen que los Necrones murieron hace mucho, dejando tras de sí nada más que ruinas de roca negra, pero yo no lo creo. Aún existen, y están más cerca de lo que parece».
languages.original_text: "After more than one decade of searching, I have amassed a modest collection of objects that belonged to these Necrons, but I have never succeeded in understanding the purpose of most of them. Many believe that Necrons died out long ago, leaving behind only ruins of black rock, but I do not believe so. They exist still, and they are closer than they seem."

traits.locale_text: «Tras más de una década de búsqueda, he amasado una modesta colección de objetos que pertenecían a los Necrones, pero nunca he conseguido comprender el propósito de la mayoría de ellos. Muchos creen que los Necrones murieron hace mucho, dejando tras de sí nada más que ruinas de roca negra, pero yo no lo creo. Aún existen, y están más cerca de lo que parece».

languages.text: “经过十多年的搜寻，我收集了一小批属于那些太空死灵的物品，但我始终没能理解其中绝大多数的用途。许多人认为太空死灵早已灭绝，只留下黑石废墟，但我不这么认为。他们仍然存在，而且与我们的距离比想象中更近。”
languages.original_text: "After more than one decade of searching, I have amassed a modest collection of objects that belonged to these Necrons, but I have never succeeded in understanding the purpose of most of them. Many believe that Necrons died out long ago, leaving behind only ruins of black rock, but I do not believe so. They exist still, and they are closer than they seem."

traits.locale_text: “经过十多年的搜寻，我收集了一小批属于那些太空死灵的物品，但我始终没能理解其中绝大多数的用途。许多人认为太空死灵早已灭绝，只留下黑石废墟，但我不这么认为。他们仍然存在，而且与我们的距离比想象中更近。”

languages.text: « Après plus de dix années de recherches, j'ai amassé une solide collection d'objets ayant appartenu à ces Nécrons, mais pour la plupart, je n'ai pas encore réussi à comprendre leur fonction. Pour bien des gens, les Nécrons ont tous disparu depuis longtemps, ne laissant derrière eux que des ruines de roche noire, mais je ne suis pas de cet avis. Ils existent toujours, et ils sont même plus proches de nous que nous ne le pensons. »
languages.original_text: "After more than one decade of searching, I have amassed a modest collection of objects that belonged to these Necrons, but I have never succeeded in understanding the purpose of most of them. Many believe that Necrons died out long ago, leaving behind only ruins of black rock, but I do not believe so. They exist still, and they are closer than they seem."

traits.locale_text: « Après plus de dix années de recherches, j'ai amassé une solide collection d'objets ayant appartenu à ces Nécrons, mais pour la plupart, je n'ai pas encore réussi à comprendre leur fonction. Pour bien des gens, les Nécrons ont tous disparu depuis longtemps, ne laissant derrière eux que des ruines de roche noire, mais je ne suis pas de cet avis. Ils existent toujours, et ils sont même plus proches de nous que nous ne le pensons. »

languages.text: "Nach mehr als einem Jahrzehnt der Suche habe ich eine bescheidene Sammlung von Objekten angehäuft, die diesen Necrons gehörten. Allerdings weiß ich bei den meisten bis heute nicht, wozu sie dienen. Viele glauben, Necrons wären vor langer Zeit ausgestorben und hätten nur Ruinen aus schwarzem Fels zurückgelassen, aber ich glaube das nicht. Sie existieren noch und sind näher als es scheint."
languages.original_text: "After more than one decade of searching, I have amassed a modest collection of objects that belonged to these Necrons, but I have never succeeded in understanding the purpose of most of them. Many believe that Necrons died out long ago, leaving behind only ruins of black rock, but I do not believe so. They exist still, and they are closer than they seem."

traits.locale_text: "Nach mehr als einem Jahrzehnt der Suche habe ich eine bescheidene Sammlung von Objekten angehäuft, die diesen Necrons gehörten. Allerdings weiß ich bei den meisten bis heute nicht, wozu sie dienen. Viele glauben, Necrons wären vor langer Zeit ausgestorben und hätten nur Ruinen aus schwarzem Fels zurückgelassen, aber ich glaube das nicht. Sie existieren noch und sind näher als es scheint."

languages.text: 「10年以上探し続けて、ネクロンの品々をそこそこ集めた。ネクロンは大昔に滅び、黒い岩の廃墟が残されただけだと多くの人は信じているが、私はそうは思わない。彼らはまだ存在し、見かけよりも近くにいる。」
languages.original_text: "After more than one decade of searching, I have amassed a modest collection of objects that belonged to these Necrons, but I have never succeeded in understanding the purpose of most of them. Many believe that Necrons died out long ago, leaving behind only ruins of black rock, but I do not believe so. They exist still, and they are closer than they seem."

traits.locale_text: 「10年以上探し続けて、ネクロンの品々をそこそこ集めた。ネクロンは大昔に滅び、黒い岩の廃墟が残されただけだと多くの人は信じているが、私はそうは思わない。彼らはまだ存在し、見かけよりも近くにいる。」

languages.text: "On yılı aşkın bir arayışın ardından bu Nekronlara ait mütevazı bir nesne koleksiyonu biriktirdim ancak çoğunun amacını anlamayı başaramadım. Birçoğu, Nekronların çok uzun zaman önce yok olduğuna ve geride yalnızca kara kayalardan oluşan harabeler bıraktığına inanıyor. Fakat ben öyle düşünmüyorum. Onlar hâlâ var ve göründüklerinden daha yakınlar."

Many believe that Necrons died out long ago, leaving behind only ruins of black rock, but I do not believe so. They exist still, and they are closer than they seem."
